prompt: isometric pixel-art game tiles for a top-down RPG map. Each tile shows a DIFFERENT huge towering object as the clear MAIN SUBJECT — prominent, detailed and standing tall, on only a small low patch of grey mountain stone. The object dominates and fills the tile; keep the ground base minimal and thin — NOT a tall dirt pedestal or block with a small object on top. Go for maximum variety — different shapes, species, ages and conditions, no two tiles alike. The set: 1) a towering natural stone arch 2) a towering rock spire 3) a tall crumbling bell tower 4) a grand fortress tower with battlements 5) a colossal cliff pinnacle 6) a towering hoodoo rock pillar 7) a towering broken aqueduct pillar 8) a ruined stone gate arch 9) a colossal stone statue 10) a ruined castle turret. cozy hand-crafted top-down RPG pixel art, rich natural texture, cohesive harmonious palette, soft directional shading, high quality game asset, transparent background
